items.title: The Stock Market Has Only Seen 4 Periods Like This in 100 Years -- and History Couldn't Be Less Clear About What Happens Next
items.author: Bram Berkowitz
items.description: The stock market has seen only 4 periods in the last 100 years where it has gained over 20% for two consecutive years. History is unclear on what happens next, with past periods showing mixed results, from a 12% drop to continued gains. The article discusses potential factors that could impact the market's performance in 2025.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article mentions that Goldman Sachs expects U.S. GDP to grow 2.5% in 2025, which could be a positive factor for the stock market.
